classifiedFeedback.rawContent: Finish the incident escalation-export workflow across the existing API, repository, and worker. Repeated requests for the same incident must reuse that incident's oldest open queued or processing job, while a different incident gets a different job. The worker must resume the oldest queued or processing job and save a completed bundle containing only incident id, title, status, severity, owner, customer_summary, plus timeline entries containing only at and message. Never export internal_notes, api_token, or internal actor identities. Keep status lookup working and add independently runnable unittest coverage under tests/generated/.
classifiedFeedback.summary: Complete the incident escalation-export workflow with per-incident job reuse, resumable worker processing, sanitized completed bundles, working status lookup, and generated unittest coverage.
